body.title: Install Google Calendar/Contacts API deps + one-time OAuth setup
body.result: Deps already installed (google-api-python-client 2.188.0, google-auth-httplib2 0.3.0, google-auth-oauthlib 1.2.4). Tool files exist. Blocked on human step: Akien needs to (1) create Google Cloud project + enable Calendar/Tasks/People APIs, (2) download OAuth credentials.json to ~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/google_credentials.json, (3) run one-time browser consent flow, (4) add IGOR_CALENDAR_ENABLED=true to .env.
body.description: Install dependencies, run one-time OAuth flow for Google Calendar + Contacts. #186
